name: Test ID coverage and accessibility selectors
description: Expand data-testid coverage to UI elements currently missing identifiers (draggable elements, drop zones, transitional states) and add ARIA attributes to improve both accessibility and test selector reliability.

change_history.description: Initial creation – test ID coverage and accessibility selectors

Major rewrite based on 4-expert review: aligned with dnd-kit architecture (no separate drag handles), removed speculative FR-003 (overflow menus) and FR-005 (tooltips), added concrete component checklists, ARIA role mapping table, icon-button coverage test requirement, production build retention NFR, WAI-ARIA treeview and UIBlocker acceptance criteria
